text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin has convinced herself that her sisters'
dream is to dance. And she remains sure of that
until the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sisters scold her for deciding their dreams for
them, and insist that what they really want is for
her to keep racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her coworkers feel the same, seeing their own
dreams in her running. Ines's races touch people's
hearts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides to run in the Arima Kinen against
such strong opponents as Oguri Cap and Mejiro
Ryan, and with the dreams of her family—and
everyone else—on her shoulders!
